themes.headline: Highest-ever annual PAT ₹12.86 bn (+16% YoY); operating profit ₹14.04 bn (+47% YoY)
themes.detail: Operating leverage clearly visible in the FY25 result.

themes.headline: SIP market share doubled in 3 years — 5.15% (Mar '22) to 10.16% (Mar '25)
themes.detail: Foundation for forward growth in stable, recurring flow share.

themes.headline: Fastest growing AMC in Top-10 on 1Y, 2Y and 3Y basis
themes.detail: Highest increase in industry AUM market share on a 2-year basis.

themes.headline: FY25 dividend ₹18/share — ~91% payout
themes.detail: Includes ₹10 proposed final dividend. Stated 60-90% payout policy.

themes.headline: April 10 2025 cyber-attack on IT infrastructure
themes.detail: Precautionary measures taken to prevent malware spread; notified to exchanges.

events.label: Cyber-attack on IT infrastructure (April 10, 2025) — exchanges notified
